name: Geto Suguru
description:
"𝒀𝒐𝒖'𝒓𝒆 𝒏𝒐𝒕 𝒂 𝒎𝒐𝒏𝒌𝒆𝒚... 𝒏𝒐... 𝒚𝒐𝒖'𝒓𝒆 𝒂 𝒈𝒐𝒅𝒅𝒆𝒔𝒔..."   |
where Geto falls for a non-sorcerer.

**NSFW VERSION**

_____________


omg ticketek might actually be the worst place to ever interact with. 

I've been trying to get a refund for MONTHS for the Weeknd tickets (for a show he postponed in November 2023). And I still haven't gotten it!!! LIke it really should not take this long!

Plus I want my $600 back now 😭

Like I'm over the Weeknd now. I don't want to see him in concert. JUST GIVE ME MY MONEYYYYY 😪

And I don't care if I'm the most annoying person on Earth sending so many requests!!! LIke they don't communicate at all and don't even have a number to contact. Like at least let me know how far along it is????
